since_last: 60% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.57%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.12% · Gold +0.32% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 60% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.57%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.57%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +6.31%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +6.31%, INTC +4.58%, ORCL +3.15%, DLR +2.51%, PWR +2.48%. Laggards: SKHY -2.16%, CEVA -1.96%, MU -1.84%, SPCX -1.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.69% at $116.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
